name: Millet Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the millet flour, soy flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, mix together the liquid ingredients: orange juice (or water), vegetable oil, and rice syrup or honey.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Divide the batter evenly among 12 well-oiled muffin cups.
5. Bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes (35-40 minutes for a loaf) or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing the muffins.
